title: cleanup denormalized text fields (Audit Phase 1)
description:
## Summary

- Removes denormalized text fields from DB layer and normalizes references per DB audit phase 1
- Cleans up `questionnaire-db.ts`: removes redundant denormalized columns, tightens query projections
- Cleans up `website-db.ts`: normalizes room/user references, removes stale text duplicates
- Cleans up `messaging-db.ts`: removes denormalized sender/room name fields, uses FK joins instead
- Updates `website-schema.yaml` to reflect the normalized schema
- Regenerates `docs/db-schema-diagram.md` and `k3d/docs-content/db-schema.md` to reflect removed columns

## Files changed

- `website/src/lib/questionnaire-db.ts` — denormalized text fields removed
- `website/src/lib/website-db.ts` — normalized room/user references
- `website/src/lib/messaging-db.ts` — sender/room name denormalization removed
- `k3d/website-schema.yaml` — schema updated to match normalized structure
- `docs/db-schema-diagram.md` + `k3d/docs-content/db-schema.md` — regenerated ER diagram
- `scripts/db-schema-diagram.py` — diagram generation script updates
- `website/src/pages/api/admin/rooms/[id].ts` + `website/src/pages/api/portal/rooms/[id]/messages.ts` — API handlers updated for new schema

## Test plan

- [ ] Verify questionnaire queries return correct data without denormalized fields
- [ ] Confirm messaging API responses still include joined display names via FK joins
- [ ] Check ER diagram renders correctly in docs
- [ ] Run `task test:all` — CI unit + manifest tests green
- [ ] Smoke test room/message endpoints on dev cluster
